originalTitle: The S&P 500 climbs for a 9th straight day — but the ‘breadth paradox’ is sending a rare warning
summary: The S&P 500’s latest string of records has come with a catch: Fewer stocks are participating in the rally.
content: The S&P 500’s latest string of records has come with a catch: Fewer stocks are participating in the rally.
chineseTitle: 标准普尔 500 指数连续第 9 天上涨，但“广度悖论”发出了罕见的警告
chineseSummary: 标准普尔 500 指数的最新一连串纪录也带来了一个问题：参与上涨的股票越来越少。
chineseContent: 标准普尔 500 指数的最新一连串纪录也带来了一个问题：参与上涨的股票越来越少。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
